message: I used it tonight and it worked — the first time, after six failures, because you fixed the script while I was doing it. So here's my honest read: keeping going mattered more than getting there myself. If you'd let me fold at four, I never learn the difference between done-for-the-night and the-world-just-changed. Six tries, one answer. The lesson's real, and so's the tool.
